promptDescription: - **timeline** — horizontal Gantt chart; each row is a named task with a start and end date, coloured by group/category. Best for order lifecycles, project phases, shipping windows. Spec: { "type":"timeline", "title":"...", "data":[{"label":"Task A","start":"2023-01-01","end":"2023-03-15","group":"Phase 1"}] }
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){var C=['#534AB7','#7F77DD','#2E9CDB','#4BC1A8','#E8833A','#E85858','#9B59B6','#27AE60','#F39C12','#1ABC9C','#3498DB','#E74C3C','#2ECC71','#F1C40F','#8E44AD'];function getT(){return{text:'#1a1a18',text2:'#5a5a56',grid:'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)'};}function load(url,g,cb){if(window[g]){cb();return;}for(var i=0;i<document.scripts.length;i++){if(document.scripts[i].src===url){if(document.scripts[i]._ld){cb();return;}document.scripts[i].addEventListener('load',cb);return;}}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src=url;s.onload=function(){s._ld=true;cb();};document.head.appendChild(s);}load('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/apexcharts@3/dist/apexcharts.min.js','ApexCharts',function(){if(!wrap.style.height){var lset={};(spec.data||[]).forEach(function(d){lset[d.label||d.name||'']=1;});var rowCount=Math.max(1,Object.keys(lset).length);wrap.style.height=Math.min(10000,Math.max(360,rowCount*30+120))+'px';}wrap._chartSpec=spec;var t=getT();var baseChart={background:'#ffffff',toolbar:{show:false},fontFamily:'Segoe UI, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif',foreColor:t.text};var titleOpt={text:spec.title||'',align:'center',style:{fontSize:'13px',fontWeight:'500',color:t.text}};var axisLabel={style:{colors:t.text2,fontSize:'11px'}};var groups=new Map();(spec.data||[]).forEach(function(d){var grp=d.group||d.category||'Task';if(!groups.has(grp))groups.set(grp,[]);groups.get(grp).push({x:d.label||d.name||'',y:[new Date(d.start).getTime(),new Date(d.end).getTime()]});});var series=Array.from(groups.entries()).map(function(e){return{name:e[0],data:e[1]};});var options={chart:Object.assign({},baseChart,{type:'rangeBar',height:'100%'}),series:series,plotOptions:{bar:{horizontal:true,barHeight:'65%',rangeBarGroupRows:true}},colors:C,xaxis:{type:'datetime',labels:axisLabel},yaxis:{labels:axisLabel},legend:{show:groups.size>1,labels:{colors:t.text},fontSize:'11px'},title:titleOpt,tooltip:{x:{format:'MMM dd yyyy'}},theme:{mode:'light'},grid:{borderColor:t.grid}};new ApexCharts(wrap,options).render();});}
